entries.source: To delete your personal information. If you make this request, we will delete the personal information we hold about you as of the date of your request from our records and direct any service providers to do the same. In some cases, deletion may be accomplished through de-identification of the information. If you choose to delete your personal information, you may not be able to use certain functions that require your personal information to operate. To stop selling your personal information. We don’t sell or rent your personal information to any third parties for any purpose. We do not sell your personal information for monetary consideration. However, under some circumstances, a transfer of personal information to a third party, or within our family of companies, without monetary consideration may be considered a “sale” under California law. You are the only owner of your Personal Data and can request disclosure or deletion at any time. If you submit a request to stop selling your personal information, we will stop making such transfers. Please note, if you ask us to delete or stop selling your data, it may impact your experience with us, and you may not be able to participate in certain programs or membership services which require the usage of your personal information to function. But in no circumstances, we will discriminate against you for exercising your rights. To exercise your California data protection rights described above, please send your request(s) by email: support@inspir.app Your data protection rights, described above, are covered by the CCPA, short for the California Consumer Privacy Act. To find out more, visit the official California Legislative Information website. The CCPA took effect on 01/01/2020.
entries.value: si delete kaaga shakhsi ah macluumaad. haddii aad samee tan request, annaga wuu delete shakhsi ah macluumaad annaga hold ku saabsan aad as ee date ee kaaga request ka yimid keenna records iyo toos ah kasta Bixiyeyaasha Adeegga si do isku mid. gudaha some kiisas, deletion waxaa laga yaabaa noqo accomplished iyada oo loo marayo de-identification ee macluumaad. haddii aad dooro si delete kaaga shakhsi ah macluumaad, aad waxaa laga yaabaa ma noqo able si isticmaal certain functions taas require kaaga shakhsi ah macluumaad si operate. si stop selling kaaga shakhsi ah macluumaad. annaga don’t sell ama rent kaaga shakhsi ah macluumaad si kasta third parties loogu talagalay kasta purpose. annaga do ma sell kaaga shakhsi ah macluumaad loogu talagalay monetary consideration. However, under some circumstances, transfer ee shakhsi ah macluumaad si dhinac saddexaad, ama within keenna qoys ee companies, la'aan monetary consideration waxaa laga yaabaa noqo considered “sale” under California sharci. aad waa only owner ee kaaga Xogta Shakhsiyeed iyo wuu karaa request disclosure ama deletion ee kasta waqti. haddii aad submit request si stop selling kaaga shakhsi ah macluumaad, annaga wuu stop making such transfers. Please note, haddii aad weydii us si delete ama stop selling kaaga xog, taas waxaa laga yaabaa impact kaaga experience leh us, iyo aad waxaa laga yaabaa ma noqo able si participate gudaha certain programs ama membership adeegyo kee require usage ee kaaga shakhsi ah macluumaad si function. laakiin gudaha no circumstances, annaga wuu discriminate against aad loogu talagalay exercising kaaga xuquuq. si exercise kaaga California xog protection xuquuq described above, please send kaaga request(s) by email: support@inspir.app kaaga xog protection xuquuq, described above, waa covered by CCPA, short loogu talagalay California Consumer Privacy Act. si find out badan, visit official California Legislative macluumaad mareeg. CCPA took effect ku 01/01/2020.

entries.source: Unlike a generic chatbot, inspir organizes AI around learning modes so learners can start with the kind of help they need: hints, questions, quizzes, active recall, roleplay, debate, or feedback.
entries.value: Unlike guud chatbot, inspir organizes AI ku wareegsan qaababka waxbarashada so ardayda wuu karaa bilow leh kind ee caawin iyaga u baahan: tilmaamo, su'aalo, su'aalo, xasuusin firfircoon, jilid door, dood, ama jawaab-celin.

entries.source: Unmute film

entries.source: Unpack historical events through causes, triggers, consequences, and alternative possibilities.
entries.value: Falanqee dhacdooyinka taariikhiga ah adigoo eegaya sababaha, kiciyeyaasha, cawaaqibka, iyo suurtagalnimada kale.

entries.source: Use
entries.value: Isticmaal

entries.source: Use "{value1}" as a launchpad, not a stopping point. The strongest learning session moves from reading into recall, feedback, and one visible next step.
entries.value: Isticmaal "{value1}"as launchpad, ma stopping qodob. strongest waxbarasho session moves ka yimid akhris u rogo recall, jawaab-celin, iyo hal visible tallaabada xigta.

entries.source: Use 50/10 breaks
entries.value: Isticmaal nasashooyinka 50/10

entries.source: Use a compact table for given answer, correct idea, misconception, and next move.
entries.value: Isticmaal compact jadwal loogu talagalay given jawaab, correct fikrad, faham-qaldan, iyo xiga move.

entries.source: Use a credibility scorecard and questions to investigate next.
entries.value: Isticmaal credibility scorecard iyo su'aalo si investigate xiga.

entries.source: Use a deep work contract with outcome, block plan, rules, and review.
entries.value: Isticmaal deep work contract leh outcome, block qorshe, xeerarka, iyo dib-u-eegis.

entries.source: Use a guided path for moving from confusion to examples, checks, and recall.
entries.value: Isticmaal guided jid loogu talagalay moving ka yimid confusion si tusaalooyin, hubinno, iyo recall.

entries.source: Use a live AI learning mode to turn this guide into questions, feedback, examples, and next steps.
entries.value: Isticmaal live qaab waxbarasho AI si u beddel tan hage u rogo su'aalo, jawaab-celin, tusaalooyin, iyo xiga tallaabooyin.

entries.source: Use a live mode when you know the exact point of confusion and want the next explanation, question, hint, or review loop.
entries.value: Isticmaal qaabka tooska ah marka aad know exact qodob ee confusion iyo rabto xiga sharaxaad, su'aal, tilmaan, ama wareeg dib-u-eegis.

entries.source: Use a mode tuned for hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, or planning.
entries.value: Isticmaal qaab tuned loogu talagalay tilmaamo, su'aalo, su'aalo, Flashcards, qoraal jawaab-celin, ama qorshayn.

entries.source: Use a prompt starter
entries.value: Isticmaal prompt starter

entries.source: Use a structured lesson when you know the course area and want a sequenced explanation or practice set.
entries.value: Isticmaal structured lesson marka aad know course area iyo rabto sequenced sharaxaad ama tababar set.

entries.source: Use a table with front, back, hint, and common trap.
entries.value: Isticmaal jadwal leh front, back, tilmaan, iyo dabin caadi ah.

entries.source: Use AI as a coach for understanding, practice, and feedback instead of a shortcut that quietly removes the learning.
entries.value: Isticmaal AI as tababare loogu talagalay understanding, tababar, iyo jawaab-celin halkii ee shortcut taas quietly removes waxbarasho.

entries.source: Use AI as a programming coach, project partner, data interpreter, and research helper while keeping the learner in the loop.
entries.value: Isticmaal AI as barnaamij-sameyn tababare, mashruuc lammaane, xog interpreter, iyo cilmi-baaris helper inta keeping arday gudaha loop.

entries.source: Use AI as a study workflow, not a shortcut.
entries.value: Isticmaal AI as study hab-socod, ma shortcut.

entries.source: Use AI feedback to sharpen structure and clarity without losing your own voice.
entries.value: Isticmaal AI jawaab-celin si sharpen structure iyo clarity la'aan losing kaaga u gaar ah voice.

entries.source: Use AI for hints, explanations, mistake checks, and review loops. Do not ask it to produce a final answer you cannot explain.
entries.value: Isticmaal AI loogu talagalay tilmaamo, explanations, qalad hubinno, iyo dib-u-eegis wareegyo. Do ma weydii taas si produce jawaab kama dambays ah aad cannot sharax.

entries.source: Use AI for the next hint, a step check, or draft feedback while keeping the final reasoning and voice yours.
entries.value: Isticmaal AI loogu talagalay xiga tilmaan, step hubi, ama qoraal qabyo ah jawaab-celin inta keeping kama dambays reasoning iyo voice taada.

entries.source: Use AI for the thinking around the answer
entries.value: Isticmaal AI loogu talagalay thinking ku wareegsan jawaab

entries.source: Use AI historical worlds, persona simulations, debate, philosophy, and evidence labels without confusing roleplay for sources.
entries.value: Isticmaal AI taariikhi worlds, persona simulations, dood, falsafad, iyo caddeyn labels la'aan confusing jilid door loogu talagalay ilo.

entries.source: Use AI homework coaching for hints, step checks, math reasoning, and writing feedback while keeping the final work yours.
entries.value: U isticmaal tababarka shaqo-guri AI tilmaamo, hubinno tallaabo, sababaynta xisaabta, iyo jawaab-celin qoraal adigoo shaqada ugu dambeysa ka dhigaya mid adiga kuu gaar ah.

entries.source: Use AI simulations as learning scaffolds while keeping sources, evidence, and interpretation clear.
entries.value: Isticmaal AI simulations as waxbarasho scaffolds inta keeping ilo, caddeyn, iyo interpretation cad.

entries.source: Use AI time travel, historical conversations, and debate practice to explore context, evidence, arguments, and perspectives.
entries.value: Isticmaal safar-waqti AI, wada-hadallo taariikhi ah, iyo tababar dood si aad u sahamiso macne, caddeyn, dood, iyo aragtiyo.

entries.source: Use AI to pressure-test your reasoning, surface assumptions, and improve decisions.
entries.value: Isticmaal AI si pressure-tijaabi kaaga reasoning, surface assumptions, iyo improve decisions.

entries.source: Use AI to slow down reasoning, check steps, debug mistakes, and practise concepts.
entries.value: Isticmaal AI si slow down reasoning, hubi tallaabooyin, sax qalad qaladaad, iyo practise fikrado.

entries.source: Use Explain My Answer when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Debate any topic. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Isticmaal Sharax Jawaabtayda marka tani tahay qaabka saxda ah ee hawsha. Haddii aad rabto jid la xiriira, isku day Dood Mawduuc Kasta. Waxa kale oo aad baadhi kartaa blogga waxbarashada AI si aad u hesho hababka waxbarashada, barasho Socratic ah, flashcards, jilid door, iyo xasuusin firfircoon.

entries.source: Use Explain My Answer when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Isticmaal Sharax Jawaabtayda marka aad rabto kalfadhi si degdeg ah u bilaabma isla markaana adiga kula qabsada. Yoolka koowaad ma aha in la dhawaaqo si cajaa'ib leh. Yoolka koowaad waa in tallaabada xigta laga dhigo mid suuragal u muuqata.

entries.source: Use Feynman Tutor when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Misconception Doctor. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.

entries.source: Use Flashcard Builder to convert misses into focused recall prompts.
entries.value: Isticmaal Dhisaha Flashcards si u beddel misses u rogo diiradda saaran recall Prompts.

entries.source: Use Flashcard Builder when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Exam Prep Planner. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.

Waxa kale oo aad baadhi kartaa blogga waxbarashada AI si aad u hesho hababka waxbarashada, barasho Socratic ah, flashcards, jilid door, iyo xasuusin firfircoon.

entries.source: Use Flashcards and Spaced Review to turn misses into repeatable memory work.
entries.value: Isticmaal Flashcards iyo Dib-u-eegis Kala Fog si u beddel misses u rogo repeatable xusuus work.

entries.source: Use flashcards or quizzes so the article becomes a practice loop, not just advice.
entries.value: Isticmaal Flashcards ama su'aalo so maqaal becomes wareeg tababar, ma just advice.

entries.source: Use folders, tags, note summaries, links, and review actions.
entries.value: Isticmaal folders, tags, note summaries, xiriiriyo, iyo dib-u-eegis actions.
